description: MCP server for Atlassian Confluence Data Center - access and manage content
name: io.github.b1ff/atlassian-dc-mcp-confluence

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a shared dotenv-style config file. When set, values are read from this file before direct environment variable overrides are applied.
environmentVariables.name: ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Confluence host domain (e.g. your-instance.atlassian.net). Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE or CONFLUENCE_API_BASE_PATH.
environmentVariables.name: CONFLUENCE_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Confluence API base path (alternative to CONFLUENCE_HOST). Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE or CONFLUENCE_HOST.
environmentVariables.name: CONFLUENCE_API_BASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Confluence Personal Access Token or API token. Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE.
environmentVariables.name: CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN
